affected_pattern: Enterprise customers with long-running sessions see intermediate and final billing records both rated as full sessions
root_cause: Interim billing record semantics lost in new rating pipeline — the refactored pipeline stopped correlating interim (S-billing record) and final (F-billing record) billing records by session-ID, treating each as a standalone billable session instead of aggregating.
supporting_evidence: Duplicate Charge RCA Playbook: Interim/Final billing record Correlation Defect pattern
telecom billing TS 32.298 section on S-billing record and F-billing record semantics cites this as a known hazard
Pipeline rewrite removed the session-ID correlation index
recommended_action: Re-introduce session-ID correlation and aggregation in the rating pipeline
Re-rate long sessions in the affected window and adjust charges
Issue credit for double-counted session minutes
Contract test the pipeline against a synthetic session spanning 3 interim and 1 final billing record
